reference: THE PRIORESS WHO WAS USUALLY SUBJECTED TO THE BARRIER OF SILENCE AND WHOSE RESERVOIR WAS OVERFULL ROSE AND EXCLAIMED WITH THE LOQUACITY OF A DAM WHICH HAS BROKEN AWAY
text: The Pryrus, who was usually subjected to the barrier of silence and whose reservoir was overfull, rose and exclaimed with the loquacity of a dam which has broken away.
